item.title: Last 12 Rows End in Disaster
item.description: The final 12 rows of the field take a turn for the worse. Watch unexpected challenges and setbacks unfold during harvest or fieldwork.

media:content.media:title: Last 12 Rows End in Disaster
media:content.media:description: The final 12 rows of the field take a turn for the worse. Watch unexpected challenges and setbacks unfold during harvest or fieldwork.

item.title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
item.description: A moment that proves it was definitely Dougo. Watch the action and see why this moment stands out in the story.

media:content.media:title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
media:content.media:description: A moment that proves it was definitely Dougo. Watch the action and see why this moment stands out in the story.

item.title: Time for New Projects: Machinery Shuffle
item.description: Getting ready for new farm projects by shuffling machinery into place. Watch the organization, prep, and planning that sets up a productive season.

media:content.media:title: Time for New Projects: Machinery Shuffle
media:content.media:description: Getting ready for new farm projects by shuffling machinery into place. Watch the organization, prep, and planning that sets up a productive season.

item.title: City Vehicle Stuck in Country Snow
item.description: A city vehicle gets stuck in deep country snow. Watch the rescue attempt and see the techniques used to free it and get back on the road safely.

media:content.media:title: City Vehicle Stuck in Country Snow
media:content.media:description: A city vehicle gets stuck in deep country snow. Watch the rescue attempt and see the techniques used to free it and get back on the road safely.

item.title: Hook, Line, and Sinker: Dougo’s Dream
item.description: Watch as Dougo finally achieves his dream. From start to finish, see the excitement and effort that make this moment unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: Hook, Line, and Sinker: Dougo’s Dream
media:content.media:description: Watch as Dougo finally achieves his dream. From start to finish, see the excitement and effort that make this moment unforgettable.

item.title: This One Will Get the Neighbors Talking
item.description: A bold or surprising action sparks attention in the neighborhood. Watch the event unfold and see why it’s sure to get everyone talking.

media:content.media:title: This One Will Get the Neighbors Talking
media:content.media:description: A bold or surprising action sparks attention in the neighborhood. Watch the event unfold and see why it’s sure to get everyone talking.

item.title: We Crushed Our Grain Tank Auger
item.description: A grain tank auger takes a heavy hit on the farm. Watch the damage, the recovery process, and lessons learned to prevent future equipment mishaps.

media:content.media:title: We Crushed Our Grain Tank Auger
media:content.media:description: A grain tank auger takes a heavy hit on the farm. Watch the damage, the recovery process, and lessons learned to prevent future equipment mishaps.

item.title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
item.description: A surprising or memorable moment involving Dougo unfolds. Watch and relive the unexpected action or reaction that made this moment stand out.

media:content.media:title: That Was Definitely Dougo!
media:content.media:description: A surprising or memorable moment involving Dougo unfolds. Watch and relive the unexpected action or reaction that made this moment stand out.
